testcase.name: test_TC_Interaction_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("//*[@data-testid=\"consent-manager-dialog-footer\"]")

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py#x1B[0m:82: in test_TC_Interaction_01 #x1B[0mexpect(page.locator(#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33mxpath=//*[@data-testid=#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33mconsent-manager-dialog-footer#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m]#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m)).to_be_visible(timeout=#x1B[94m15000#x1B[39;49;00m)#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: None#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Error: element(s) not found #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - waiting for locator("//*[@data-testid=\"consent-manager-dialog-footer\"]")#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/ai-voices" 5 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_2_f871\test_page_2_f871.py#x1B[0m:25: in test_TC_Navigation_02 #x1B[0mexpect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(#x1B[33mr#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m/enterprise#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m))#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/enterprise')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/pricing #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/ai-voices"#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 5 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/pricing"#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_04

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')' Actual value: https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJDJDZFTGACPSQBMA03ZWATM Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 4 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/ai-voices" - waiting for" https://www.jellypod.com/signup" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJDJDZFTGACPSQBMA03ZWATM" 2 × unexpected value "https://login.jellypod.com/sign-up?client_id=client_01K4VN6KHJECJDHRVF0QV2F4PM&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fjellypod.com%2Fauth%2Fcallback&authorization_session_id=01KJDJDZFTGACPSQBMA03ZWATM"

testcase.name: test_TC_FooterLinks_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/terms')' Actual value: https://www.jellypod.com/features/video-podcasts Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 3 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/ai-voices" 6 × unexpected value "https://www.jellypod.com/features/video-podcasts"
